name: JD Vance
summary: JD Vance has consistently demonstrated a pattern of behavior that includes disparaging certain groups, such as childless individuals, immigrants, and elites. He has made numerous false or unsubstantiated claims, including allegations that Haitian migrants are eating pets and that childless people are more sociopathic. Vance has also shown a willingness to create and spread false stories to advance his agenda, as evidenced by his admission to creating stories to get media attention. Additionally, he has expressed extremist views, including a proposed federal ban on gender-affirming care for minors and a call for a "de-woke-ification program" even if it is deemed illegal. Vance's actions and statements suggest a disregard for facts and a tendency to prioritize ideology over truth.

entries.fact: JD Vance complained about 'highly educated transplants' in Silicon Valley in an op-ed in The New York Times.
JD Vance said elite tech crowds wielded 'political-financial power in combination with a certain condescension' in an interview.
Our Ohio Renewal, a nonprofit founded by JD Vance, spent more on 'management services' provided by its executive director than on programs to fight opioid abuse.
Our Ohio Renewal, a nonprofit founded by JD Vance, raised around $221,000 and spent most of its revenue on overhead costs and travel.

Our Ohio Renewal's biggest accomplishment, sending psychiatrist Sally Satel to Ohio's Appalachian region, was 'tainted' by the ties among Satel, her employer, American Enterprise Institute (AEI), and Purdue Pharma.
JD Vance said in a podcast interview that being childless 'makes people more sociopathic and ultimately our whole country a little bit less, less mentally stable'.

JD Vance said in a speech at a Center for Christian Virtue leadership meeting that childless teachers were 'trying to brainwash the minds of our children' and criticized American Federation of Teachers President Randi Weingarten
JD Vance suggested in an interview on The Charlie Kirk Show that childless people should be taxed at a higher rate than those with children

JD Vance said in a Fox News interview that the country is run by 'a bunch of childless cat ladies who are miserable at their own lives and the choices that they've made and so they want to make the rest of the country miserable too'

Tim Ryan, the Democratic nominee, said Our Ohio Renewal was a front for JD Vance's political ambitions, pointing to reports that the organization paid a Vance political adviser and conducted public opinion polling, while its efforts to address addiction failed.
JD Vance voted against raising the debt ceiling, standing against final passage of the Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023
JD Vance introduced legislation that would have made gender-affirming care for minors a federal crime, with penalties of up to 12 years in prison
JD Vance sponsored the Dismantle DEI Act, which would ban federal diversity, equity, and inclusion programs and funding for agencies, contractors, and organizations receiving federal funds
JD Vance had missed every US Senate vote since becoming Donald Trump's vice-presidential running mate
JD Vance said that a vice president 'doesn't really matter' and that Kamala Harris 'has been a bad vice president' in an interview.

JD Vance told a private fundraiser that Kamala Harris 'does not have the same baggage as Joe Biden' and later said the 'political calculus' of the election did not change with Harris as the Democratic nominee.
JD Vance said that Trump had 'said that explicitly that he would' veto a national abortion ban.

JD Vance said that Kamala Harris 'can go to hell' because 'she wants to yell at Donald Trump' after Trump's campaign was embroiled in controversy for allegedly bringing cameras into a restricted area of Arlington National Cemetery.

JD Vance alleged that Haitian illegal immigrants were 'draining social services and generally causing chaos all over Springfield, Ohio' and that 'reports now show that people have had their pets abducted and eaten by people who shouldn't be in this country'.

JD Vance promoted a claim that African migrants were eating cats in Dayton, Ohio, despite Dayton authorities reporting 'no evidence to even remotely suggest that any group, including our immigrant community, is engaged in eating pets'.

JD Vance alleged a 'massive rise in communicable diseases' in Springfield, Ohio, despite Clark County's health commissioner reporting having 'not seen a substantial increase in all reportable communicable diseases'.

JD Vance defended his claims about Haitian migrants eating cats, saying that he was willing 'to create stories so that the American media actually pays attention ... we're creating a story, meaning we're creating the American media focusing on it.'
JD Vance said he did not believe Trump lost the 2020 presidential election and that he believed 'Big Tech rigged the election' through censorship

JD Vance objected to fact-checking during the vice presidential debate, arguing that the rules were that the moderators would not fact-check, and claimed that Haitian immigrants in Springfield, Ohio should not be considered legal because the federal government decided their protected status after they had arrived in the United States.
JD Vance cast the tie-breaking vote to confirm Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense.
JD Vance wrote that 'judges aren't allowed to control the executive's legitimate power' after multiple federal judges issued temporary rulings against various Trump administration actions.
JD Vance declared 'ideological war' on Europe in a speech at the Munich Security Conference, stating that the biggest security threat to Europe comes from within, not from Russia or China.

JD Vance told Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy that the path to peace and prosperity is through diplomacy, but then became confrontational, telling Zelenskyy it was 'disrespectful' to question Trump's diplomatic efforts in front of the American media.

JD Vance visited Greenland and said 'We can't just ignore the president's desires' for the U.S. to acquire Greenland, and warned that Greenland faced the 'encroachment of powerful countries' China and Russia 'as they expand their ambitions'.

JD Vance lamented that the 'globalist economy' had caused the United States to 'borrow money from Chinese peasants to buy the things those Chinese peasants manufacture', and his remarks were criticized by China.
JD Vance published his memoir 'Hillbilly Elegy: A Memoir of a Family and Culture in Crisis'.
JD Vance stated that he was 'not an active participant' in any particular Christian denomination but was 'thinking very seriously about converting to Catholicism'.
JD Vance was baptized and confirmed in the Catholic Church, citing the influence of Peter Thiel and the alignment of Catholic theology with his political views.
JD Vance argued for a higher tax rate on childless Americans in a 2021 interview.
JD Vance stated that he opposes abortion, even in cases of rape, and believes that the fetus has inherent value and should be protected.
JD Vance won the 2022 United States Senate Republican primary in Ohio with 32.22% of the vote.
JD Vance won the 2022 United States Senate election in Ohio with 53.04% of the vote.
JD Vance proposed a federal ban on gender-affirming care for minors.
JD Vance was chosen by acclamation as the vice presidential nominee at the 2024 Republican National Convention.
JD Vance wrote the foreword for the book 'Dawn's Early Light: Taking Back Washington to Save America' by Kevin Roberts.
JD Vance wrote a blurb for the book 'Unhumans' by Jack Posobiec and Joshua Lisec.
JD Vance expressed a belief that childlessness is linked to sociopathy and suggested that parents should have more voting power than non-parents.
JD Vance accepted the vice presidential nomination from Donald Trump despite previously calling Trump 'reprehensible' and comparing him to 'America's Hitler'

JD Vance stated that if he had been vice president during the 2020 presidential election, he would not have certified the results and instead would have supported sending pro-Trump electors to Congress to decide the election.
JD Vance argued that the country's largest and most powerful institutions have united against the right and called for 'a de-woke-ification program' even if the courts say it is illegal.
JD Vance made a comment referring to some women as 'childless cat ladies', sparking widespread criticism
JD Vance defended his 'childless cat ladies' comment, characterizing it as 'sarcastic'
JD Vance argued for a higher tax rate on childless Americans in an interview.
JD Vance stated that 'childless people' in US leadership are 'more sociopathic'
JD Vance has a history of disparaging people without kids.
JD Vance bashed a teachers union president for not having 'some of her own' children in resurfaced remarks.
JD Vance told Kamala Harris to 'go to hell' in response to criticism she did not actually make
JD Vance pushed false accusations of Haitians eating pets.
JD Vance said a false claim he spread against Haitian migrants may not be true but urged followers to keep posting 'cat memes'.
JD Vance spreads debunked claims about Haitian immigrants eating pets.
JD Vance appeared at an event hosted by a hard-right Christian nationalist who had previously spoken about Kamala Harris's 'witchcraft'
JD Vance stated that Donald Trump did not lose the 2020 election, saying 'not by the words I would use'
JD Vance endorsed Cory Bowman, his half-brother, for the 2025 Cincinnati mayoral election.
JD Vance's cousin, Nate Vance, criticized JD's stance on Ukraine, accusing him and Trump of aiding Russia.

JD Vance falsely claimed that Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy had campaigned for the opposition in Pennsylvania in October 2024, when in fact Zelenskyy had visited a factory to thank workers producing ammunition for Ukraine.
JD Vance said he regrets his past criticism of Donald Trump
JD Vance once described Donald Trump as an 'idiot' and compared him to 'Hitler' in a private message, questioning whether Trump could be 'America's Hitler'
JD Vance promoted far-right views in a speech about extremists' book
JD Vance shared a social media post about immigrants cooking pets in Dayton, which the city refuted
JD Vance stuck by pet-eating claims and said he's willing to 'create stories'
JD Vance declared ideological war on Europe in a speech at the Munich Security Conference
JD Vance was involved in a heated argument with Ukrainian President Zelenskyy in the Oval Office, which ended with Trump cutting the meeting short
JD Vance told Greenlanders that their country is cold and that China is coming for them
JD Vance called Chinese people 'peasants', prompting a backlash from China
